q: What plant did you grow when you were young?
examiner_note: Nói về kỷ niệm trường học hoặc ở nhà. Sử dụng 'bean sprouts', 'sparked my interest', 'natural world', 'nurture'.

band7.text: I remember growing some simple bean sprouts in a jar for a school science project. It was fascinating to see them grow so quickly from just a small seed, and it really sparked my interest in the natural world. I felt very proud when they started to sprout.
band7.note: Sử dụng ví dụ thực tế và giải thích cảm xúc (sparked my interest, sprout).

band8.text: When I was a child, I helped my grandmother tend to her small herb garden. I remember successfully growing some basil from a seedling. It was my first real experience of nurturing something and seeing it flourish, which was incredibly rewarding and taught me a lot about patience.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng hay (tend to, seedling, nurturing, flourish, rewarding).

band9.text: I recall a school project where we were tasked with cultivating sunflowers. The process of monitoring their daily growth and eventually seeing their vibrant yellow blooms was truly captivating. It was a formative experience that instilled in me a lifelong fascination with the cycle of life and the resilience of nature.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức độ cao (cultivating, monitoring, captivating, formative, instilled).

v.example: He tries to cultivate a positive attitude.

v.meaning: để hình thành/có tính quyết định
v.example: These are the formative years of a child's life.
Parents should instill good values in their children.

similar_questions: Do you think it's important for children to learn about plants?
What other things did you grow?
